creator: alpha.dev@gmail.com
text:
Edwin Groothuis wrote:
> Maintainer of misc/ipbt,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/117518 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/117518
> 

Hi,

This port is a nightmare.

The patch will not work, because the source tarball has changed. This 
happens all the time, with no change to the filename (the revision 
number, for instance, like you would expect).

I have had several discussions with the author and he is stubborn and 
unhelpful. The port needs to be removed, unless somebody can make some 
kind of suggestion. Martin Wilke very kindly offered to host the source 
on his mirror, but sometimes by the time I've told him of an update and 
the mirror is updated, the original has changed again.

It is a shame because it is a sophisticated piece of software being let 
down by the one person that should be interested in getting it used more 
widely.

Thanks.

-- 
Matt
